Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Ghastly Charge
Waystone (Tier 15)
--------
Revives Available: 0 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +25% (augmented)
Pack Size: +10% (augmented)
Monster Rarity: +18% (augmented)
Monster Effectiveness: +28% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +90% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 81
--------
{ Suffix Modifier "Flaming" (Tier: 1) }
Area has patches of Ignited Ground
{ Suffix Modifier "of Enduring" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters are Armoured
{ Suffix Modifier "of Overpowering" (Tier: 1) }
Monster have 104(100-119)% increased Elemental Ailment Application
{ Suffix Modifier "of Exposure" (Tier: 1) }
-8(-8--6)% maximum Player Resistances
{ Suffix Modifier "of the Prism" (Tier: 1) }
+30(30-34)% Monster Elemental Resistances
{ Suffix Modifier "of the Unwavering" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 78(70-79)% increased Ailment Threshold
Monsters have 63(60-69)% increased Stun Threshold
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
--------
Corrupted
